feed.title: whimsysoul

entry.title: How an Airbnb host preps for the winter season ❄️ Hosting in Arnold is so much fun, but this is a 4 season destination and we always want to make sure that our cabin and guest are prepped for the winter season! ❄️❄️❄️❄️❄️❄️ book a stay with me, link in b

entry.title: IKEA is my happy place ✨❤️ That New Year itch to reorganize and finally tackle my Shelf Of Doom has finally hit, so Robin and I headed to the @IKEA in Downtown San Francisco to pick up some goodies. I actually haven't been in here before, so it was a fun

entry.title: San Francisco food hall you can't miss! Imagine hitting up happy hour here with the girls at Saluhall and then tipsy shopping at IKEA? Makes for a great lunch, too. I know this isn't brand new (about a year old) but it took me this long to stop by and no
entry.content: San Francisco food hall you can't miss! Imagine hitting up happy hour here with the girls at Saluhall and then tipsy shopping at IKEA? Makes for a great lunch, too. I know this isn't brand new (about a year old) but it took me this long to stop by and no

entry.title: Ended 2024 with a bang ✨🎉 Started by heading to Ocean Beach here in San Francisco to catch the last sunset of 2024. Brought a bottle of Veuve Clicquot, some truffle popcorn and a cozy Sezane sweater + scarf (it got cold FAST once the sun set!!) Then bac

entry.title: Travel PSA! 🚨You now NEED a Visa to enter the UK! 🇬🇧 Starting Jan 2025, you need to have an approved UK ETA (electronic travel authorisation) which is basically just a visa, and a program to pre-screen travelers passing through the UK. You need this even
entry.content: Travel PSA! 🚨You now NEED a Visa to enter the UK! 🇬🇧 Starting Jan 2025, you need to have an approved UK ETA (electronic travel authorisation) which is basically just a visa, and a program to pre-screen travelers passing through the UK. You need this even

entry.title: Palm Springs Airport is insane like what do you mean I can snack on a cheesy quesadilla while sitting on actual grass under the shade of an actual palm tree all without leaving the airport??? 😱🌴✈️ California forever 🫶 If you haven't had a chance to fly th

entry.title: Ugly shelf makeover!! 😱 Our Shelf Of Doom finally broke me. We thrifted this red shelf almost 10 years ago from Facebook Marketplace when we were broke AF and just moved into this apartment. But it's always been a clutter zone. Living in a small space m
entry.content: Ugly shelf makeover!! 😱 Our Shelf Of Doom finally broke me. We thrifted this red shelf almost 10 years ago from Facebook Marketplace when we were broke AF and just moved into this apartment. But it's always been a clutter zone. Living in a small space m

entry.title: I challenge YOU to donate $25 to LA fire victims!! If you have an extra $25, instead of sharing thoughts and prayers Story slides, I challenge you to donate $25 to someone displaced by these fires. I've learned from friends that have gone through CA wil
entry.content: I challenge YOU to donate $25 to LA fire victims!! If you have an extra $25, instead of sharing thoughts and prayers Story slides, I challenge you to donate $25 to someone displaced by these fires. I've learned from friends that have gone through CA wil

entry.title: $21k a night! 😱 this iconic hotel room in San Francisco can be found at the @fairmontsanfrancisco and is utterly beautiful. At 6,000 square feet with 3 bedrooms + baths, a 2-story library (with a secret passageway to the rooftop), a billiards room, sitti
entry.content: $21k a night! 😱 this iconic hotel room in San Francisco can be found at the @fairmontsanfrancisco and is utterly beautiful. At 6,000 square feet with 3 bedrooms + baths, a 2-story library (with a secret passageway to the rooftop), a billiards room, sitti

entry.title: ABC news is coming to my apartment in 10 mins to interview me about the TikTok ban! 😱 of course today, the one day I didn't make my bed or get properly dressed, they call. But I'm honored to represent this community! Wish me luck! #abcnews #sanfrancisco #
entry.content: ABC news is coming to my apartment in 10 mins to interview me about the TikTok ban! 😱 of course today, the one day I didn't make my bed or get properly dressed, they call. But I'm honored to represent this community! Wish me luck! #abcnews #sanfrancisco #

entry.title: How are you feeling about the TikTok ban? Can't believe I got to talk to ABC Channel 7 tonight! #abcnews #tiktokban #sanfrancisco #contentcreator
entry.content: How are you feeling about the TikTok ban? Can't believe I got to talk to ABC Channel 7 tonight! #abcnews #tiktokban #sanfrancisco #contentcreator

entry.title: Not on my 2025 bingo card but I'm honored to represent creators and TikToKers for ABC Channel 7 News here in the Bay Area! #abcnews #tiktokban #sanfrancisco #contentcreator #bayarea #reporter #journalism #onlyinsf #influencer
entry.content: Not on my 2025 bingo card but I'm honored to represent creators and TikToKers for ABC Channel 7 News here in the Bay Area! #abcnews #tiktokban #sanfrancisco #contentcreator #bayarea #reporter #journalism #onlyinsf #influencer

entry.title: fellow influencers I KNOW you have brand new clothes, makeup and personal care items! My challenge to you is to donate those to LA Fire victims! Donation centers need NEW (or barely used) items. That's what is most helpful. I know we all have clothes that
entry.content: fellow influencers I KNOW you have brand new clothes, makeup and personal care items! My challenge to you is to donate those to LA Fire victims! Donation centers need NEW (or barely used) items. That's what is most helpful. I know we all have clothes that

entry.title: PSA for makeup artist who lost everything in the LA fires I have brand new unopened sigma beauty, blush sets, and makeup that has not been expired. I would love to send this directly to you if you need to get back on your feet so you can start your busine
entry.content: PSA for makeup artist who lost everything in the LA fires I have brand new unopened sigma beauty, blush sets, and makeup that has not been expired. I would love to send this directly to you if you need to get back on your feet so you can start your busine

entry.content: They say you build your fyp brick by brick

entry.title: waking up with perfect hair after 9 hours of sleep is my jam. ✨ @theordinary products for skin cycling @niveausa my fave winter moisturizer @kiehls avocado eye cream @solawave wand red light @target acne cream (it's just $6!) @philipshue smart lights fo

entry.title: Traffic over a mile long to donate! I arrived 10 mins before they opened for donations and already the line of cars was a half mile long. Thank you to the team and volunteers for putting this charity drive together!! #bayarea #sanfrancisco #lafires #dona
entry.content: Traffic over a mile long to donate! I arrived 10 mins before they opened for donations and already the line of cars was a half mile long. Thank you to the team and volunteers for putting this charity drive together!! #bayarea #sanfrancisco #lafires #dona

entry.title: Replying to @brikston.ahuv nothing makes us put aside that NorCal vs SoCal rivalry faster than when our neighbors are in crisis. I was so floored by how many people turned up for the LA Fires drive in Emeryville today. The team handled it so well, everyt
entry.content: Replying to @brikston.ahuv nothing makes us put aside that NorCal vs SoCal rivalry faster than when our neighbors are in crisis. I was so floored by how many people turned up for the LA Fires drive in Emeryville today. The team handled it so well, everyt

entry.title: Haven't re-introduced myself in forever. 🫣 and since it's goodbye soon, I wanted to say: Welcome to club Whimsy! So happy to have you here ❤️✨ Please follow me on Instagram, I want to stay connected! #tiktokban #whimsysoul #sanfrancisco #influencer #cont
entry.content: Haven't re-introduced myself in forever. 🫣 and since it's goodbye soon, I wanted to say: Welcome to club Whimsy! So happy to have you here ❤️✨ Please follow me on Instagram, I want to stay connected! #tiktokban #whimsysoul #sanfrancisco #influencer #cont

entry.title: Capitalism has made even the most average slog in the machine heartless and doing it all for the bottom line #california #lafires #contentcreator #captalism #consumerism #influencer #marketing #eatonfire #palisadesfire #losangeles #content #influencermark

entry.title: PSA if you still have your Christmas lights up, you don't actually like Christmas THAT much. You just need better mood lighting!! We're anti-Big Light people (unless you need it for a task, and then it goes RIGHT off again!) 1. Start by replacing your lig
